items.name: Tic Tac Toe Board
items.description: Play a quick game of Tic Tac Toe with a nearby player! (Get close to another player and click on them to start a game - they need to accept your challenge for the game to start).

items.name: Cowbell
items.description: MOAR COWBELL!

items.name: Ultimate Summer Soaker
items.description: This little number fulfills all your water war needs.

items.name: Bronze Khopesh
items.description: Standard issue for the ancient Egyptian infantry.

items.name: Golden Katana of Destiny
items.description: Do you fulfill the sword's golden destiny or does it help you fulfill yours?

items.name: 2019 Fireworks
items.description: Start off 2019 with a bang!

items.name: Kunai
items.description: The weapon is small, the danger is great.

items.name: Orinthian Falcon
items.description: A noble guardian to help protect you on your quest.  And by protect, I mean attack all enemies.  Circles above you and attacks those enemies unfortunate enough to be selected as his prey.  This falcon is from the future and features 5 different attack modes.

items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: SunFire Scroll
items.description: Use the power of the scroll, to unleash a torrent of sunfire blast around you!

items.name: Wooden Dreidel
items.description:
I have a little dreidel /
I made it out of clay /
And when it's dry and ready /
Then dreidel I shall play! /
PS - This dreidel is actually made out of wood, but the dreidel song was obligatory - Spin the dreidel and see how many chocolate coins you win!

items.name: Pinata Mount
items.description: A candy-filled friend to call your own, just don’t let anyone take a swing at him.

items.name: Steampunk Bow and Arrow
items.description: Click and hold to charge this semi-rapid fire bow. Does 9 to 32 damage per arrow.

items.name: Bombastic Sword
items.description: Your foes will definitely see it coming, but you're so fast it doesn't matter!

items.name: Old Timey Hot Air Balloon
items.description: Up, up, and away! Equip and click to spawn the hot air balloon; hop in the seat and click around and hold your mouse button to guide the balloon around in the direction of your cursor. Flames ignite by the engine above as you're ascending

items.name: Music Blaster
items.description: Music is destroy this generation!  Literally!  This awesome gun shoots your foes to do 10 points of damage - it's music to your ears!  Don't forget to try out this item's special by hitting the 'Q' key.

items.name: Implosion Bomb
items.description: Click once and then toss the bomb onto the ground- away from yourself of course! The implosion bomb will beep for five seconds and then implode. Everything flies inward and anyone hit will take 100 damage points!

items.name: Personal Plane
items.description: All the freedom of flying without all that meddlesome flight school or pilot's license.

items.name: Year of the Dog Lantern
items.description: Happy Lunar New Year! Celebrate with your own ghostly guard dog to protect you.

items.name: Wizard Flight Spell
items.description: Take flight with this magic spell!  Jump to begin flight; control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit the space bar again to stop flying.

items.name: Endless Summer Fireworks
items.description: Just one click and you're in for a huge fireworks display!  This firework will reload every 5 seconds so the fun never has to stop!.
